description: The Gas House Gang was a New York City street gang founded in the 1890s, based in the Gas House district of Manhattan. They controlled the area along Third Avenue from 11th to 18th Street, specializing in armed robbery, extortion, and operating brothels. The gang committed an estimated 30 to 40 robberies per night and dominated the district for over two decades until being absorbed by the Five Points Gang in 1910.
